signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely, Strategy Buys $2
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely, Strategy Buys $2.54B BTC | YES | HIGH confidence**  
On April 22, 2026, President Trump extended the Iran ceasefire indefinitely, removing geopolitical risk premiums and driving a crypto market rally with Bitcoin topping $77K (up 2.2%), Ethereum up 0.7% to $2,390, and XRP up 1.5% to $1.45.[1][7]  
Strategy's $2.54B BTC purchase lifted holdings past 815,00
